# Project Progress Module

Module ID: project-progress
Status: draft
Purpose: Project progress timelines, worker access, media metadata, comments, and customer-facing public snapshots.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/project-progress check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/project-progress build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/project-progress test

Owned tables:
- project_progress_projects
- project_progress_access
- project_progress_logs
- project_progress_media_files
- project_progress_comments

Use the service API for mutations. Keep auth, customer records, QR images, uploads, signed URLs, and notifications in route adapters or companion modules.
